meaning: Three special letters: Alif, Lam, Ra (opening of Surah)
that (pointing to something far away) (describes ءَايٰتُ)
was he/it? (questioning the state of something in لِلنَّاسِ عَجَبًا)
that (introduces what was revealed in أَوْحَيْنَآ)
and give good news! (command to one person)
those who (plural, referring to believers in this ayah)
that/indeed (emphasizes the statement about قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ)
their Lord (connected to عِندَ meaning 'with their Lord')
a clear one/one who makes very clear (describing هٰذَا 'this' in the ayah)
who, which, that - used to describe something that was just mentioned
and the earth (as object of خَلَقَ/created)
in (connects سِتَّةِ with what comes before it)
then (connects this part about Allah rising above the throne to the previous part about creation)
from (connecting شَفِيعٍ with what comes after it)
any intercessor (after مَا مِن - there is not)
His permission (possessed by Him, coming after بَعْدِ)
your (all of you) Lord and Nurturer (subject of إِنَّ)
then will you not? (connected to تَذَكَّرُونَ - remember)
your (plural) place/time of return (subject of إِلَيْهِ)
all together (describing how إِلَيْهِ مَرْجِعُكُمْ happens)
truly/certainly (describing how Allah's promise is real)
indeed he/it (referring to Allah's promise mentioned before)
he returns/brings it back (referring to الْخَلْقَ/the creation)
so that he may give what is deserved (purpose of يُعِيدُهُ - He repeats it)
with justice (connected to لِيَجْزِىَ - to reward)
and those who (connected to ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
for them (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)
a drink (subject of لَهُمْ - they have)
and a punishment (connected to شَرَابٌ - 'a drink')
because of what, due to what
he (the one who made the sun and moon)
and He determined it precisely (referring to the moon's phases)
phases (of the moon that Allah set)
so that you all may know
he created (subject of ما in this ayah)
Allah (the subject of خَلَقَ - He created)
that (pointing to what was mentioned before)
except (connects to ما before it to mean 'not except' = only)
with/by the truth (describing how Allah created this)
alternation/succession (of الَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ - the night and day)
and what (refers to things Allah created)
he created (subject of what Allah created)
and the earth (in relation to Allah's signs)
for a people (who يَتَّقُونَ - are mindful)
they are consciously protecting themselves (from wrong)
our meeting (object of يَرْجُونَ - they hope for)
and they were pleased with (the دُّنْيَا)
our signs/miracles/verses (that people are heedless of)
those who are heedless (3+ males, subject)
their place of shelter (subject of النَّارُ)
because of what (connects to يَكْسِبُونَ - they earn)
those who (plural relative pronoun, subject of ءَامَنُوا۟)
in (connects جَنَّاتِ 'gardens' to what comes before)
of the bliss (possessed by جَنَّاتِ - gardens)
their prayer/call (referring to the people of Paradise)
And even if (connects to يُعَجِّلُ - accelerates)
he makes something happen very quickly (subject of لَوْ)
for/to the people (object of يُعَجِّلُ - hastens)
with the good (contrasted with الشَّرَّ/evil in this ayah)
to them (referring to the people mentioned in لِلنَّاسِ)
and so we leave (them) (connected to لَقُضِىَ - would be decreed)
those who (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in context)
they hope (subject of يَعْمَهُونَ - they wander blindly)
our meeting (object of يَرْجُونَ - they hope for)
and when (introduces the condition of مَسَّ/touches)
he called upon us (when affliction touched him)
then when (connects to كَشَفْنَا - we removed)
we removed/uncovered (from him ضُرَّهُ his hardship)
he passed by (as part of كَأَن لَّمْ يَدْعُنَآ)
any harm/hardship (being affected by مَسَّ - touched)
for the ones who exceed limits
what (referring to يَعْمَلُونَ - they used to do)
their messengers (who came to them with جَآءَتْهُم)
and not (they were not going to believe)
like that (referring to how We destroyed previous nations)
the people (acted upon by نَجْزِى - we recompense)
then/next (connects to جَعَلْنٰكُمْ - We made you)
we made you all (into خَلٰٓئِفَ - successors)
successors (plural) (object of جَعَلْنٰكُمْ - we made you)
so that we may look (purpose for جَعَلْنٰكُمْ - We made you)
and when (introduces the condition of تُتْلَىٰ - being recited)
it (our clear signs) is being recited (to them)
upon them (referring to those who don't hope for meeting Us)
he said (responding to those who don't believe in meeting Allah)
they hope/expect (referring to the disbelievers who don't hope for meeting Allah)
with a Quran (object of ٱئْتِ - bring)
or (connecting 'bring' with 'change' in بِقُرْءَانٍ غَيْرِ هٰذَآ أَوْ بَدِّلْهُ)
change it! (as a strong command to change the Quran)
that (connects to أُبَدِّلَهُۥ - I change it)
I change/replace it (referring to the Quran mentioned earlier)
from (showing that changing the Quran would come from the Prophet's own self)
of one's own accord (in relation to نَفْسِى)
my self/soul (in تِلْقَاءِ نَفْسِىٓ - of my own accord)
except (introduces what is excluded from يُوحَىٰٓ)
I fear (in response to قُلْ - say)
my Lord (subject of عَصَيْتُ - if I disobey)
great, mighty (describing يَوْمٍ - day, showing it follows another word)
I recited it (referring to the Quran)
I remained/stayed (describing how long the Prophet ﷺ lived among his people)
you (all) use intellect (addressing the disbelievers who should reflect on the Prophet's life)
so who/then whoever (subject of أَظْلَمُ - more unjust)
he strongly denied/rejected (the signs/verses of اللَّهِ)
with/by His signs or verses (object of كَذَّبَ)
and they say (about their false gods)
our helpers who speak for us (describes هؤلاء/these)
say! (a command from Allah to Muhammad ﷺ)
Do you (all) inform (Allah about something He doesn't know)
Allah (as the object being informed about)
and He is exalted (above what they associate with Him)
they join/associate (others with Allah in worship)
one (feminine, as a description of أُمَّةً/nation)
so they disagreed (after being one united community)
and if not for (connects to previous statement)
surely it would have been judged (in response to كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتْ)
between them (referring to الناس/the people who differed)
in it (referring to what they disagree about)
and they say (about the lack of a sign from Allah)
why not (questioning أُنزِلَ - was sent down)
was sent down (something that وَيَقُولُونَ 'they say' about)
then say! (responding to وَيَقُولُونَ - and they say)
only/just (restricts what يَقُولُونَ 'they say' to one thing)
with you all (being addressed in إِنِّى)
the ones who are waiting (among مَعَكُم - with you)
we made (someone) taste/experience (النَّاسَ رَحْمَةً - made people taste mercy)
the people (being given mercy by Allah)
severe hardship (object of أَذَقْنَا - we gave them to taste)
Allah (the one true God) (subject of أَسْرَعُ - is swifter)
in/within (shows location inside الْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ - the land and sea)
when (introduces the condition of being in ships)
with/by them (referring to the people on the ships)
with/by a wind (describing how they traveled)
with a very pleasant/good (describing رِيحٍ - wind)
it came to it (wind came to the ship)
a wind (subject of جَآءَتْهَا - it came to them)
and came to them (referring to the waves in الْمَوْجُ)
from (showing where the waves came from)
that they (object of ظَنُّوٓا۟ - they thought)
with/by them (object of جَرَيْنَ - they sailed)
Allah (as the one being called upon)
those who are making (something) pure sincerely (calling upon Allah in this ayah)
for him/it (connected to دَعَوُا۟, they called)
if indeed (connecting to دَعَوُا۟ they called)
you saved us (referring to the supplication to Allah in the ayah)
from (connects كُلِّ مَكَانٍ to the waves)
surely we will definitely be (responding to اللَّهَ)
those who are thankful (connected to مِنَ meaning 'among/from')
of/in/on the earth (connected to فِى before it)
the people (as the one being addressed)
your (all of you) transgression (against أَنفُسِكُم - yourselves)
then (connecting what happened after Allah saved them)
and then we will tell you all important news
with/about what (connects to تَعْمَلُونَ - you used to do)
and so it became mixed (with نَبَاتُ)
with it (referring to the water that mixed with plants)
when (introduces the time when أَخَذَت happens)
its beauty/decoration (being taken by the earth)
and she made herself beautiful or adorned herself
upon it/her (referring to الْأَرْضُ - the earth)
he came to her/it (subject of أمرنا)
during the daytime (describes when أَمْرُنَا/our command came)
and so we made it (referring to الْأَرْضُ - the earth)
completely cut down/harvested (describing how فَجَعَلْنٰهَا made it)
the signs, the proofs (being explained in detail by نُفَصِّلُ)
for/to a people (who will think يَتَفَكَّرُونَ)
they think deeply (about the signs of Allah mentioned in this ayah)
And Allah (as the subject of يَدْعُوٓا۟)
He calls/invites (to دَارِ ٱلسَّلٰمِ - the Home of Peace)
of the peace (possessed by دارِ - home/abode)
they did excellently (subject of لِلَّذِينَ - for those who)
those (pointing to something far) (subject of أَصْحٰبُ)
they/them (referring to أَصْحٰبُ 'the companions' in this ayah)
with its like (meaning: with a similar evil deed)
of Allah/God's (possessed by or connected to Allah)
as if, just as (describing how their faces were covered)
it was covered (describes وُجُوهُهُمْ - their faces)
pieces (describing how something was covered in أُغْشِيَتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ - their faces were covered)
of the night (part of قِطَعًا مِّنَ - pieces of)
of the intense fire (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ/companions)
in it (referring to النار - the Fire)
we gather them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned later as الَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوا)
all together (describing how something is done)
then, after that (connecting وَيَوْمَ with نَقُولُ)
your (all of you) place! (what we say to them)
and so we separated completely (between them)
between them (referring to the false gods and their worshippers)
you all were (addressing the polytheists مَكَانَكُمْ أَنتُمْ وَشُرَكَآؤُكُمْ)
you (all) worship (addressing the polytheists in this ayah)
by Allah (as witness between فَكَفَىٰ and شَهِيدًۢا)
and between you all (connecting to بَيْنَنَا - between us)
whatever, that which (with emphasis and lengthened pronunciation)
she sent ahead/forwarded (referring to نَفْسٍ - soul)
and they were sent back (to اللَّهِ)
of Allah (possessor of مَوْلَىٰهُمُ - their true protector)
of/to the truth (being returned to اللَّهِ)
from them, away from them (refers to their false gods mentioned earlier)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ before مَن يَرْزُقُكُم)
he provides you all (object of يَرْزُقُ)
or who? (asking about who does the actions in يَمْلِكُ and يُخْرِجُ)
he possesses/controls (the hearing in this ayah)
the Living One (object of يُخْرِجُ - brings out)
of the dead (thing/person) (object of مِنَ - from)
and he makes (something) exit/brings out (connected to يَرْزُقُكُم - provides for you)
the dead (object of يُخْرِجُ - brings out)
of the living one (object of مِنَ)
then they will say (in response to قُلْ)
Allah (the one true God who will say this in response)
So will you not...? (following from previous statement)
so that for all of you (pointing to اللَّهُ)
your Lord (referring to Allah as the true Lord in this ayah)
so what thing (comes after الْحَقُّ - the truth)
so how (connects to تُصْرَفُونَ - you are turned away)
you (all) are being turned away (from the truth)
she/it became true (referring to كَلِمَتُ - the word)
they broke away from obedience (subject of لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ)
Allah (as the subject of يَبْدَؤُا۟ - He begins)
he returns/brings it back (object of يَبْدَؤُا)
so how/in what way (connects to تُؤْفَكُونَ - you are deluded)
is there? / do you have? (asking قُلْ - say)
that/to (connects to يُتَّبَعَ - to be followed)
you (all) judge/decide (in this ayah, asking how you make your judgment)
they do/are doing (referring to the majority mentioned in أَكْثَرُهُمْ)
and what/not (connects to previous statement and negates كَانَ)
it could be fabricated (subject of كان)
and yet/but still/however (connecting to previous statement about Quran not being fabricated)
and a detailed explanation (object of كَانَ)
from (connecting دُونِ with what comes after)
the worlds (object of رَبِّ - Lord of)
or (asking about an alternative in يَقُولُونَ)
he made it up himself (object of يَقُولُونَ)
with a single chapter (object of command 'bring forth')
of the deity, of the god
if (introducing condition for كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ - you are truthful)
they strongly denied/rejected (something) as false (subject of بَلْ)
with what (they denied without having full knowledge of it)
not (negates يُحِيطُوا۟ 'they encompassed' to 'they did not encompass')
and when not yet, and while not
from (connects قَبْلِ to what came before)
before them (referring to those who denied in the past)
so look!/then observe! (command to Prophet ﷺ)
in/with/by him/it (referring back to what was mentioned before)
and your lord (subject of أَعْلَمُ - most knowing)
with the people who spoil or damage things (object of أَعْلَمُ)
and if (followed by كَذَّبُوكَ - they deny you)
then say! (responding to وَإِن كَذَّبُوكَ - and if they deny you)
for me (connected to عَمَلِى - my deeds)
and for you all (connected to عَمَلُكُمْ - your deeds)
your (plural) deed/action (in contrast to the Prophet's deed mentioned earlier)
ones who are free from/innocent of (referring to multiple people)
I do/work/act (in response to كَذَّبُوكَ - they denied you)
and from them (those who listen to you)
they seek to listen (to إِلَيْكَ/to you)
to you (object of يَسْتَمِعُونَ - they listen)
the deaf ones (who are being addressed in أَفَأَنتَ تُسْمِعُ - can you make hear)
and even if (connecting to يَسْتَمِعُونَ - they listen)
and from them (who يَنظُرُ look at you)
you guide (addressing the Prophet ﷺ regarding الْعُمْىَ - the blind)
they see (referring to those who look at you)
anything (being acted upon by يَظْلِمُ - wronging)
and but indeed (connects contrasting statement to previous ayah)
the people (being acted upon by يَظْلِمُ - wrongs/oppresses)
and (on) the day (when يَحْشُرُهُمْ/He will gather them)
an hour (object of يَلْبَثُوا - they remained)
of the daytime (possessed by/part of something)
they recognize one another (referring to the people being gathered on that Day)
between them (referring to those who denied meeting Allah)
indeed/already (emphasizes يَحْشُرُهُمْ - He will gather them)
the one who/which (connects نَعِدُهُمْ with what comes before)
we will surely take you completely
then (connecting وَإِمَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ with ٱللَّهُ شَهِيدٌ)
a witness (of ما يَفْعَلُونَ - what they do)
upon, on, over (what يَفْعَلُونَ they do)
they do/perform (referring to what they do in this ayah)
and for every (connects to أُمَّةٍ - nation/community)
and they say/are saying (followed by مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ - when is this promise?)
truthful ones (describing 'you were' in إِن كُنتُمْ)
Allah (as the subject of شَآءَ - willed/wished)
of a community/nation (possessed by لِكُلِّ - for every)
then/so not (connects to يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ - they delay)
they seek to delay (referring to people's inability to delay their appointed time)
and not (connects to ضَرًّا/harm before it)
they try to go forward (in relation to سَاعَةً/an hour)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
at night (describing when عَذَابُهُۥ/His punishment comes)
during daytime (when Allah's punishment might come)
what (more emphatic) (asking about what يَسْتَعْجِلُ - they seek to hasten)
he seeks to hasten (subject of يَسْتَعْجِلُ)
from it/him (referring to عَذَابُهُ - His punishment)
and then? (expressing disbelief about what comes after إِذَا)
when (followed by مَا وَقَعَ - it happens)
with/by it (referring to العَذَاب/punishment mentioned earlier)
you (all) were (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in this ayah)
then (connecting what follows to what came before)
taste! (command to many people) (referring to عَذَابَ - punishment)
you all are being repaid (for ما كُنتُمْ تَكْسِبُونَ - what you used to earn)
you all were (referring to those who did wrong)
you (all) earn/are earning (referring to what you used to do)
and they ask you for news/information (about أَحَقٌّ - is it true?)
yes indeed (affirming أَحَقٌّ - is it true?)
indeed it/he (referring to أَحَقٌّ - is it true)
and not (negating the ability to escape in أَنتُم بِمُعْجِزِينَ)
able to escape/overcome (lit: among those who can make [something] impossible)
the earth (what is in مَا فِى - what is in)
surely she would ransom herself (referring to نَفْسٍ - soul)
and they kept (something) secret (acts on النَّدَامَةَ)
the punishment (what is being seen in رَأَوُا)
Now pay attention! (used to draw attention to what follows)
to/for Allah (belongs مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
Now surely! (used to draw attention to what follows)
indeed/truly (emphasizes that what follows is definitely true)
and yet/however (connects while contrasting with أَلَآ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ)
most of them (subject of لَا يَعْلَمُونَ)
he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)
and he causes death (connected to يُحْىِۦ - he gives life)
and towards him (you all will return to)
she came to you all (referring to مَّوْعِظَةٌ - an admonition)
and a healing (for ما في الصدور/what is in the chests)
the chests/breasts (referring to what is in people's hearts)
for the believers (connected to رَحْمَةٌ - mercy)
and by His mercy (referring to Allah's mercy)
so by that (referring to Allah's bounty and mercy)
so let them rejoice! (in response to بِفَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ - Allah's favor)
he/it (referring to فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ - Allah's favor and mercy)
than/from what (object being collected in يَجْمَعُونَ)
they gather (what they are gathering is wealth/worldly things)
he sent down (subject of أَنزَلَ is اللَّهُ)
and then you all made (the رِزْق into حَرَامًا وَحَلٰلًا)
he permitted/allowed (connected to لَكُمْ - to you)
for you all (object of أَنزَلَ - sent down)
indeed/verily (emphasizing what follows: اللَّهَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ - Allah is full of bounty)
Allah (as the object being spoken about)
most of them (refers to those who invent lies about Allah mentioned earlier in the verse)
from it (referring to the Quran being recited)
and not (connects to تَعْمَلُونَ - you do)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
upon you all (as witnesses over you)
witnesses (as the object being witnessed by كُنَّا/We)
when (referring to تُفِيضُونَ - you delve into it)
and what (connects to يَعْزُبُ - escapes/is hidden)
of a single tiny particle (object of مِثْقَالِ - weight of)
and not (connected to تَعْمَلُونَ - you do)
of the sky (in ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ)
smaller than (comparative to مِثْقَالِ ذَرَّةٍ - weight of an atom)
than (comparing with مِثْقَالِ ذَرَّةٍ - weight of an atom)
and not (connected to previous negation وَلَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ)
they feel sad (referring to أَوْلِيَآءَ ٱللَّهِ - the allies of Allah)
they believed (subject of يَتَّقُونَ - they fear Allah)
and they were (who believed in the previous ayah)
they protect themselves from harm (subject of الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
the magnificent, the mighty (describing ٱلْفَوْزُ - the triumph)
he makes you sad (affected by their words قَوْلُهُمْ)
their speech (as the subject of يَحْزُنكَ - let it not grieve you)
indeed/truly/certainly (emphasizes ٱلْعِزَّةَ لِلَّهِ - might belongs to Allah)
all together (describes how something is done)
he/it (refers to Allah in this ayah)
The All-Hearing One (subject of the sentence)
Now behold! / Indeed! (used to draw attention to what follows)
to/for Allah (belongs مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - whoever is in the heavens)
from/of (connects دُونِ with what comes before)
the assumption (object of يَتَّبِعُونَ - they follow)
they guess without knowledge (subject of هُمْ)
the one who (refers to هُوَ - He)
for you all (connected to جَعَلَ - He made)
so that you all rest (purpose of جَعَلَ)
in it (refers to الَّيْلَ - the night)
and the daylight (object of جَعَلَ - He made)
for a group of people who (connected to يَسْمَعُونَ)
they hear/listen (referring to a group of people)
he adopted/took for himself (subject of قَالُوا)
he (subject of سُبْحٰنَهُۥ - Glorified is He)
for him/to him (connected to سُبْحٰنَهُۥ - glorified is He)
what/that which (refers to everything in السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)
any proof or authority (used in this ayah to challenge those who claim Allah has a son)
against (referring to inventing lies against اللَّهِ)
their place of return (to إِلَيْنَا/to Us)
then, next, afterwards (connects إِلَيْنَا مَرْجِعُهُمْ to what came before)
the punishment (object of نُذِيقُهُمُ - we will make them taste)
because of what (connects to يَكْفُرُونَ - they disbelieve)
he was/existed (describing the state before إِن)
my place of standing (in this ayah: referring to Nuh's position among his people)
then (connects this command to the previous one)
let it be/may it be (jussive form after لا)
a source of confusion (object of يَكُنْ)
you (all) give me time (in context: don't wait for me)
then what (connecting to فَإِن تَوَلَّيْتُمْ - 'if you turn away')
if (introduces condition for سَأَلْتُكُم - I asked you)
and I was commanded (connected to فَمَا سَأَلْتُكُم)
the ones who submit peacefully (مِنَ shows this word follows 'from/among')
and who (connected to فَنَجَّيْنٰهُ - so We saved him)
in the ship (connected to فِى before it)
and we made them (into خَلٰٓئِفَ - successors)
those who/which/that (plural, refers to those who denied Our signs)
they denied intensely/repeatedly (the signs/verses mentioned in بِـَٔايٰتِنَا)
he/it was (the outcome of المنذرين - those who were warned)
the ones who are warned (those who received warning)
then (connects this part to what came before)
from (connects بَعَثْنَا 'We sent' to بَعْدِهِ 'after him')
their people (referring to the messengers' people)
with the clear proofs (object of جَآءُوهُم - they came to them)
so not (negates what comes after it in the ayah)
they denied intensively (subject of فَمَا كَانُوا۟)
with it/by it (referring to what they denied before)
like that (referring to what was mentioned before)
the transgressors (object of نَطْبَعُ - we seal)
then, next, afterwards (connecting to بَعَثْنَا - We sent)
and his chiefs (connected to إلى فرعون - to Pharaoh)
and so they made themselves act great (arrogantly)
a people (object of كَانُوا - they were)
Then when (followed by جَآءَهُمُ - it came to them)
from (connects عِندِنَا to what comes before it)
Moses (the subject of قَالَ - he said)
do you (plural) say? (Moses questioning the magicians)
when (connecting to جَآءَكُمْ - it came to you)
Is it magic? (Musa asking about what the magicians called the truth)
in order to turn us away (purpose of أَجِئْتَنَا - have you come to us)
and that it be/exist (subjunctive of يَقُولُ)
for/to you two (addressing both Moses and Aaron)
the earth (in فِى 'in' from previous word)
and what (connected to أَجِئْتَنَا - have you come to us)
for/to you both (referring to Moses and Aaron)
bring to me! (command to many people)
Then when (connects to جَآءَ which comes next)
to them (referring to السَّحَرَةُ - the magicians)
throw! (all of you) (command to the magicians)
those who are throwing (in response to موسى's command)
they threw (referring to the magicians in the story of Moses)
Moses (the one speaking to the magicians)
the magic/sorcery (subject of what Musa is talking about)
indeed/certainly (emphasizing what Allah سَيُبْطِلُهُ will nullify)
he will make it invalid (referring to السِّحْرُ/the magic)
and he makes true (subject of Allah)
the truth (object of يُحِقُّ - what Allah establishes)
and even if (connects to وَيُحِقُّ - and He establishes)
offspring (as a complete group, subject of آمَنَ)
Pharaoh (object of fear in مِن فِرْعَوْنَ)
and their assembly/nobles (referring to Pharaoh and his chiefs)
that (introduces the fear of فِرْعَوْنَ testing them)
he tests/persecutes them (Pharaoh persecuting the believers)
and indeed/certainly (connects to previous statement about Pharaoh)
the ones who go beyond limits (those who are mentioned in this ayah as being excessive in their opposition to Musa)
O my people! (Musa calling out to his people)
you all were (addressing the people of Moses)
you all believed strongly (addressing multiple people)
put your complete trust! (command to a group)
if (introducing the condition 'if you have believed')
you all were (past tense, referring to multiple people being addressed in إِن كُنتُمْ ءَامَنتُم - if you all have believed)
those who truly submit (as the object of كُنتُم)
so they said (following what happened before)
by your mercy (connected to نَجِّنَا - save us)
you two (Moses and Aaron) establish places (for your people in Egypt)
in Egypt (location where بُيُوتًا/houses are to be taken)
houses (as the object being settled in)
and bring good news! (command to المؤمنين)
the believers (the ones receiving good news from بَشِّرِ)
our caring Master (being called out to by Musa)
Pharaoh (as the object of ءَاتَيْتَ - You gave)
in (location in الْحَيَوٰةِ الدُّنْيَا - worldly life)
Our caring master! (being called by Musa)
so that they (Pharaoh and his chiefs) make (others) lose their way (from Your path)
Our Lord (being called upon by Moses)
their wealth (referring to Pharaoh and his people)
so they will not (connected to يُؤْمِنُوا)
they see (until they see العَذَابَ الأَلِيمَ)
was answered (referring to دَّعْوَتُكُمَا - your prayer)
prayer of you both (subject of أُجِيبَت, emphatic)
so you two seek to be straight
and not (connected to فَٱسْتَقِيمَا - so be steadfast)
the path (object of تَتَّبِعَآنِّ - you two follow)
they know (those who لَا before it)
and we made (them) pass through (بِبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ)
Israel (the name given to Prophet Jacob and his descendants)
and so he pursued them (فرعون pursued بني إسرائيل)
in transgression (describing how Pharaoh pursued them)
and in transgression (describing how Pharaoh followed)
I believed (said by Pharaoh when drowning)
that he (referring to the fact Pharaoh realized about Allah)
the one who/which (refers back to إِلٰهَ - deity/god)
she believed (subject of قَالَ - he said)
and I (connected to ءَامَنتُ - I believed)
before (as the subject in this phrase)
the ones who cause damage/harm (object of مِنَ)
so today (referring to the day of punishment)
so that you become (purpose for نُنَجِّيكَ - We will save you)
for who (connected to خَلْفَكَ - behind you)
behind you (as a sign for those who come after you)
a sign/miracle (object of لِتَكُونَ - for you to be)
and indeed (connects to لَغٰفِلُونَ - they are heedless)
Israel (proper name meaning 'one who strives with God')
a place that has been established (for بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ)
and we provided them with sustenance
of the good things (object of مِنَ)
and then what (connects to اخْتَلَفُوا - they differed)
until (connects to جَآءَهُمُ - came to them)
definitely came to them (subject of العِلْمُ)
on the day (when Allah will judge between them)
the resurrection (connected to يَوْمَ - Day of)
then if (connects this condition to what came before)
any doubt (that you have about فِى what)
from what (that we revealed to you)
to you (object of أَنزَلْنَا - we sent down)
they read/recite (referring to those who read الْكِتٰبَ - the scripture)
the book (object being read by يَقْرَءُونَ)
from (connects قَبْلِكَ to what comes before it)
certainly, indeed (emphasizing جَآءَكَ - 'has come to you')
the truth (that has come to you from your Lord)
so not/then do not (connected to تَكُونَنَّ)
you definitely are/become (negative command: 'do not be')
those who (referring to those who denied Allah's signs)
they strongly denied/rejected (the signs of اللَّهِ)
and then you will be (among الْخٰسِرِينَ)
those who (plural, referring to the disbelievers mentioned in حَقَّتْ عَلَيْهِمْ)
and even if/even though (جَآءَتْهُمْ - came to them)
she came to them (referring to those who reject in this ayah)
the intensely painful (describes العَذَابَ - the punishment)
she was (referring to قَرْيَةٌ - a town)
and so it gave benefit to her (result of إِيمٰنُهَآ/their faith)
except (connects to قَوْمَ يُونُسَ - the people of Yunus)
Yunus (Jonah) (object of إِلَّا قَوْمَ - except the people of)
when, after, as soon as (connects to ءَامَنُوا۟)
the disgrace (that was removed from قَوْمَ يُونُسَ)
to, towards (connects to حِينٍ - a time)
and even if (connecting to previous statement)
surely would have believed (in response to لَوْ/if)
all together (describes how everyone in الْأَرْضِ would believe)
you force (addressing Prophet Muhammad ﷺ about الناس)
and he makes/puts (subject of يَجْعَلُ الرِّجْسَ - and he puts the punishment)
they use their minds (those who لَا do not)
say! (command to one person, followed by انظُرُوا)
all of you look! (commanding multiple people)
what (asking about something in ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
from/away from (connects قَوْمٍ to what comes before)
so do/does/is/are (connecting to يَنتَظِرُونَ - they await)
from (connecting قَبْلِهِمْ to what came before)
say! (command to يَنتَظِرُونَ - those who wait)
indeed I (speaking to مَعَكُم - with you)
from/of (with emphasis, connecting to next word)
the ones who wait expectantly (after مِنَ)
they believed (referring to the believers mentioned in وَٱلَّذِينَ)
like that, similarly (connected to نُنَجِّى/we save)
the believers (those being saved by نُنجِ)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the people)
the people (as the main subject being addressed)
in/within (connects شَكٍّ 'doubt' to what comes before)
I worship (in response to تَعْبُدُونَ - what you worship)
you (all) worship (addressing the disbelievers who worship other than Allah)
I worship (in response to تَعْبُدُونَ - what you worship)
that (connects to أُمِرْتُ - I was commanded)
that I be/become (object of أُمِرْتُ - I was commanded)
the polytheists (those who join partners with Allah)
and not (connects to previous phrase and negates تَدْعُ)
from/of (connects دُونِ to what comes before it)
what/that which (introduces relative clause describing يَنفَعُكَ - benefits you)
then certainly you (if you do what was mentioned before)
in that case/therefore (shows the result of فَعَلْتَ - you did that)
with harm (in the ayah: if Allah touches you with harm)
then not (negating رَآدَّ/one who can repel)
and if (connects this condition to the previous statement)
with any good (object of يُرِدْكَ - He intends for you)
then/so not (connects to previous statement about Allah touching you with harm)
one who sends back/prevents (of His favor)
from (connects عِبَادِهِۦ to what came before)
The Most Forgiving One (as a Divine attribute of Allah)
The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)
then only/so only (connects to يَضِلُّ - goes astray)
for himself (object of يَهْتَدِى - he is guided)
he completely lost the right path (subject of فَإِنَّمَا)
with/by a guardian (in the ayah: I am not over you as a guardian)
and follow closely! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
to you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in يُوحَىٰٓ)
and be patient! (connected to وَٱتَّبِعْ - and follow)
